problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
mechanism: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics
hypothesis: Combining Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
